in_developpement: This project is still in its early stages.
title: Data integration
subtitle: For everything you want
description: Galadril provides advanced data integration and AI platform for real-time complex systems, while still ensure foresight, and transparency.

synapse.title: The Synapse
synapse.description: Heterogeneous data ingested and interconnected to form a comprehensible network.

vision.title: The Vision
vision.description: State-of-the-art AI models with extensible API to handle all threats.

scribe.title: Galadril Scribe
scribe.description: Writing technical reports in TeX with your favorite LLM to predict next actions.

hero.description: Independent drones, united by a collective consciousness. Resilience through numbers.

agility.title: Adaptive Agility
agility.desc: Fluid navigation through dense forests or complex industrial sites for emergency response.

intelligence.title: Embedded Instinct
intelligence.desc: Edge computing deployed directly on the device. Real-time decision-making to identify signs of life or crop anomalies at the speed of instinct.

scale.title: Designed for Ecosystems
scale.desc: Bit-by-bit reproducibility of behavior. Deploy the same perfect monitoring system across 10 units or 1000 for massive agricultural coverage.

mesh.title: Unbreakable mesh network
mesh.desc: If one drone falls, the swarm continues. They form a dynamic P2P network, adjusting their positions to relay critical messages without a single point of failure.

track.title: Precision Life-Tracking
track.desc: The system detects and identifies individuals with absolute precision. No more need for GPS, allowing for deep-desert rescue missions where signals are non-existent.

galadril.title: The Strength of the Collective
galadril.desc_p1: Every environmental insight is continuously reported to Galadril via the high-performance
galadril.desc_p2: protocol. The swarm learns from topographical challenges, adapting its rescue strategy at the speed of data.

energie.title: Energy sector disruption
energie.description: Simulation of the impact of a major disruption on production and sector resilience.

industrie.title: Automotive industry
industrie.description: Rationalization of reactions to a major supply chain rupture in the automotive sector.

renseignement.title: Multi-source intelligence
renseignement.description: Automated reconciliation of open-source intelligence and incident alerts.

supply.title: Supply chain operations
supply.description: Dynamic management of priorities in a global chain during a geopolitical event.

graph_section.title: Behind the scene...
graph_section.subtitle: Everything is causal, nothing is correlated.

e1: Inventory levels stabilizing in Detroit Sector.
e3: Cyber-threat mitigation active across EMEA nodes.

ringil_intro.title: Galadril has a brain,
ringil_intro.p1: Galadril's intelligence does not remain locked in servers. It extends to the final meter of the field via the {project}.
ringil_intro.p2: Where our models process causal chains, the swarm becomes the sensory organ: it identifies structural flaws and tracks movement flows to feed your operational strategy.
